description: Agent-specific eval cases — multi-hop reasoning and refactor impact

cases.question: What functions call the authentication handler, and which modules import those callers?
Trace the data flow from the API endpoint to the database — what functions are involved?
If I change the signature of process_payment, what other modules would be affected?
What would break if I rename the User model?
Show me all transitive dependencies of the main entry point
Who calls the database connection function?
What does the config module define?
Which files import the models module?
Show me the full content of the main application file
I need to see the complete test configuration
How is error handling implemented, and which API endpoints use the error handler?
Find the authentication middleware and show me every route that uses it
What logging is done in the ingestion pipeline? Show me the relevant code and all callers of the pipeline.
Find the database schema and show me every API endpoint that reads from or writes to the database
What environment variables does this project need, and where are they used in the code?
